cleavage agent: Tandem mass spectrometry was performed on the in-gel digested proteins with trypsin
enrichment method: pulled down cellular proteins using WFA-Biotin and streptavidin beads
instrument: analyzed using a Dionex Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano system coupled to a Q Exactive tandem mass spectrometry
reduction concentration: we treated cells with 2 μM DTT
